reasons.detail: Ron's table has 0 rows for this client_id across all months. All waterfall apps are incremental — they were previously untracked.

1911 apps matched via Google Click ID (GCLID) in Google Ads click_view API. These have full keyword-level attribution — we know the exact search term, ad group, and campaign. This is the highest-fidelity attribution tier.

84 apps attributed via campaign_id extracted from URL parameters (gad_campaignid) or attribution string patterns. Campaign-level attribution without keyword detail. Campaigns: Ark Marketing_CCCU_Deposit San Diego-ENG Q1 2026_Search_Google_Conversion, Ark Marketing_CCCU_Auto Loans San Diego-ENG Q1 2026_Search_Google_Conversion, Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand San Diego-ENG Q1 2026_Search_Google_Conversion, Ark Marketing_CCCU_San Diego-ENG Q1 2026_Display_Google_Retargeting, Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand San Diego-ENG Q1 2026_Display_Google_Reach, Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand Out of Market-ENG Q1 2026_Search_Google_Conversion, Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand Out of Market-ENG Q1 2026_Display_Google_Reach, Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand Out of Market-ENG Q1 2026_Display_Google_Retargeting....

29 apps identified as Google Ads via category='Paid' + subcategory='Google Ads' but no campaign_id could be extracted. These are in the 'Other Google Ads' bucket. The attribution string may lack a gad_campaignid param or use an unrecognized format.

Top 10 of 20 campaigns:
  Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand San Diego-ENG Q1 2026_Search_Google_Conversion: 928 apps (T1=928, T2=0, T3=0)
  Ark Marketing_CCCU_Brand Out of Market-ENG Q1 2026_Search_Google_Conversion: 382 apps (T1=382, T2=0, T3=0)

discrepancy.explanation: Ron's staging.google_ads_campaign_data has NO rows for client_id='california_coast_cu'. This client has not been onboarded into Ron's pipeline yet. Our waterfall is the only source of Google Ads attribution.

recommendations.title: Ron's pipeline has no data for this client
recommendations.impact: All 2,024 waterfall apps are incremental — previously untracked
recommendations.action: No discrepancy to investigate. Our waterfall is the first pipeline to attribute Google Ads for this client. Ron's staging.google_ads_campaign_data table has 0 rows for this client_id. This means we are providing attribution data that did not exist before.

recommendations.title: 1,911 apps with full keyword-level attribution (T1)
recommendations.impact: GCLID matched in Google Ads click_view API — highest fidelity
recommendations.action: These 1,911 apps have complete attribution: search term, ad group, campaign, match type, and keyword. This data comes from matching the GCLID (Google Click ID) captured in the application URL against Google's click_view report.

recommendations.title: 84 apps with campaign-level attribution (T2)
recommendations.impact: Campaign ID extracted from URL params or attribution string
recommendations.action: These 84 apps have campaign_id attribution from either: (a) gad_campaignid URL parameter, (b) campaign ID embedded in the attribution string pattern, or (c) gbraid/wbraid iOS privacy-safe click identifiers. Campaign-level KPIs (apps, approved, funded, LTV) are reliable.

recommendations.title: Attribution rate: 98.6%
recommendations.impact: T1+T2 covers vast majority of apps
